title: Prophylactic Effects of Combined Bosentan and Nintedanib on Early Post-Traumatic Joint Contracture Formation in a Rat Model.
snippet: : Post-traumatic joint contracture (PTJC) is a common complication in orthopedic surgery characterized by fibrosis and restricted joint mobility. Previous work by our multi-arm study demonstrated that nintedanib monotherapy could effectively mitigate PTJC by targeting fibroblast activation pathways.
